Article Title: France vs Iraq, FIFA World Cup Match Result: Les Bleus win 3-0 as Mbappé scores brace on 100th cap and Dembele nets first World Cup goal
Article Text:
France's Ousmane Dembele (7) celebrates with Kylian Mbappe (10) after scoring their third goal during the World Cup Group I soccer match between France and Iraq in Philadelphia, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Derik Hamilton)

Fans of France reacts after a weather delay during the World Cup Group I soccer match between France and Iraq in Philadelphia, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Matt Rourke)

Mbappe strikes first as France take control

France's Kylian Mbappe (10) celebrates after scoring his team's first goal during the World Cup Group I soccer match between France and Iraq in Philadelphia, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Petr David Josek)

Storm halts the match for more than two hours

Fans react after a weather delay during the World Cup Group I soccer match between France and Iraq in Philadelphia, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Matt Rourke)

France resume where they left off

France's Kylian Mbappe (10) celebrates after scoring his side's second goal during the World Cup Group I soccer match between France and Iraq in Philadelphia, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Matt Rourke)

France's Ousmane Dembele (7) congratulates teammate Kylian Mbappe (10) after he scored their second goal during the World Cup Group I soccer match between France and Iraq in Philadelphia, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Petr David Josek)

France dominate the numbers and the group

France secured their place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout rounds with a 3-0 victory over Iraq in Philadelphia, as Kylian Mbappé marked his 100th international appearance with a brace and earned the Superior Player of the Match trophy in a match disrupted by a 130-minute weather delay due to severe thunderstorms and lightning at half-time.France booked their place in the Round of 32 with a comfortable 3-0 victory over Iraq in Group I, overcoming a lengthy thunderstorm suspension that turned an otherwise routine evening into one of the most unusual matches of the tournament so far.At Philadelphia Stadium, Kylian Mbappe scored either side of a 130-minute weather interruption before Ousmane Dembele added a third as Didier Deschamps' side maintained their perfect start to the competition. The result moves France onto six points from two matches and guarantees qualification for the knockout stage, while Iraq remain bottom of the group and face a must-win final fixture against Senegal to keep their hopes alive.The match will also be remembered as the first weather-related suspension of the 2026 World Cup after dangerous lightning over Philadelphia forced players, officials and supporters to seek shelter during an extended half-time interval.France arrived in Philadelphia knowing victory would secure their progression and they quickly established control against an Iraqi side content to defend deep and absorb pressure.Their breakthrough arrived in the 14th minute through the player who has so often delivered on the biggest stages. Michael Olise collected possession in a central attacking area before threading a precise pass towards Mbappe on the left flank. The France captain accelerated towards goal, shifted inside his defender and unleashed a powerful curling effort from around 20 yards that flew beyond Ahmed Basil and into the near post.The goal continued another remarkable night for the 27-year-old, who was making his 100th appearance for France and had already entered the match carrying enormous momentum following his brace against Senegal in the opening group game.France continued to dominate possession and territory throughout the remainder of the first half. Iraq struggled to establish sustained attacks and failed to register a shot on target as Deschamps' side controlled the tempo through patient possession and quick circulation of the ball.Just as the opening half concluded, severe weather sweeping across Philadelphia dramatically changed the course of the evening.Heavy rain that had persisted throughout much of the match intensified and lightning strikes within the vicinity of the stadium triggered FIFA's severe weather protocols. Officials ordered both teams from the field while supporters were instructed to move into sheltered areas inside the venue.Under tournament regulations, play cannot resume until there has been a prolonged period without lightning detected within an eight-mile radius of the stadium. Continued storm activity repeatedly reset the countdown clock, resulting in a remarkable 130-minute delay.The second half eventually began at 8:00 p.m. local time, more than two hours after the players had originally left the pitch.Any concern that the lengthy interruption might disrupt France's rhythm disappeared almost immediately after the restart.Only nine minutes into the second half, Dembele drove forward and capitalised on uncertainty inside the Iraqi defence before delivering a low ball across the six-yard box. Mbappe reacted first, arriving centrally to stab the finish into the bottom corner for his second goal of the night and France's second of the evening.The strike further enhanced an already historic occasion for the France captain. His first-half opener had taken him to 15 World Cup goals, while his second moved him onto 16 for his World Cup career.France's third goal arrived in the 66th minute through Dembele, who capped an excellent individual display with his first goal at a major international tournament. Once again Olise was involved, releasing the winger into space down the right. Dembele surged past two defenders with a sharp change of direction before driving a powerful finish into the far bottom corner beyond Basil.At 3-0, the contest was effectively settled.The final statistics reflected France's control throughout the evening. Les Bleus finished with 56 per cent possession, registered 19 shots compared to Iraq's four and limited Graham Arnold's side to zero efforts on target. France completed passes at an impressive 91 per cent accuracy while Iraq finished with an 86 per cent completion rate despite spending long periods without the ball.France also won four corners to Iraq's two and consistently forced the Lions of Mesopotamia into a reactive defensive shape.The victory sends France to the top of Group I with six points from two matches and confirms their place in the knockout rounds with one game remaining. Attention now turns to a highly anticipated meeting with Norway that is likely to determine who finishes first in the group.For Iraq, the challenge becomes considerably more difficult. With two defeats from two matches, they remain bottom of the standings and will need a victory against Senegal in their final group fixture to retain any realistic hope of extending their World Cup journey.For France, meanwhile, qualification has been secured and another milestone night belonged to Mbappe, whose 100th appearance for Les Bleus ended with two goals, three points and a place in the knockout stages.
Article Summary: France secured their place in the fifa world cup 2026 knockout rounds with a 3-0 victory over iraq in philadelphia. Kylian mbappe scored either side of a 130-minute weather interruption before ousmane dembele added a third.

Article Title: ‘Messi is a joke!’ : Wayne Rooney’s 14-year-old tweet resurfaces after Argentine icon’s record-breaking World Cup heroics
Article Text:
As Lionel Messi continues to bask in his 2026 World Cup glory, Wayne Rooney's 2012 tweet dubbing Messi a 'joke' yet the 'best ever' has resurfaced, stirring conversations among fans. (Photo/IANS)

Following Lionel Messi’s historic masterclass against Austria at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, an iconic 14-year-old post by England and Manchester United legend Wayne Rooney has resurfaced online, sending football fans into an absolute frenzy.The year was 2012. A prime Lionel Messi had just scored an unbelievable five goals in a single UEFA Champions League match for Barcelona against Bayer Leverkusen. Watching the magic unfold, an awestruck Wayne Rooney took to his X (formerly Twitter) account to state the absolute obvious."Messi is a joke. For me the best ever," Rooney had posted on March 7, 2012.Fast forward 14 years later to Dallas, and those words have aged like the finest wine. On Monday night, the 38-year-old Argentine magician once again showed the world why Rooney's decade-old prediction was spot on. Messi scored a sensational brace to lead defending champions Argentina to a comfortable 2-0 victory over Austria, officially sending his country into the Round of 32.More importantly, the twin strikes catapulted Messi to the apex of football history. He reached an unprecedented 18 career World Cup goals, officially shattering Germany’s Miroslav Klose's long-standing men's record of 16 goals to become the outright all-time top scorer in tournament history.As soon as the final whistle blew in Dallas, fans dug up Rooney’s old post from the archives. The tweet quickly went viral all over again, drawing millions of fresh likes, shares, and comments from fans echoing the same sentiment.For over a decade, Rooney has remained firm on his stance in the never-ending "Greatest of All Time" (GOAT) debate, routinely placing the Argentine ahead of his former Manchester United teammate Cristiano Ronaldo. With Messi still dominating the grandest stage of them all in 2026, football enthusiasts are loudly reminding the world that Rooney called it first.
Article Summary: Wayne rooney's 2012 tweet dubbing lionel messi a 'joke' yet the 'best ever' has resurfaced, stirring conversations among fans. Messi scored a sensational brace to lead argentina to a comfortable 2-0 victory over austria, officially sending his country into the round of 32.

Article Title: 'I have zero goals in two World Cups': Zlatan Ibrahimovic marvels as Lionel Messi breaks FIFA World Cup scoring record
Article Text: 'I have zero goals in two World Cups': Zlatan Ibrahimovic marvels as Lionel Messi breaks FIFA World Cup scoring record
Article Summary: 'i have zero goals in two world cups': zlatan ibrahimovic marvels as lionel messi breaks fifa world cup scoring record. Messi scored four goals in argentina's 4-1 win over croatia in the quarter-finals. The barcelona star also scored twice in the semi-final against costa rica.

Article Title: Erling Haaland enters Golden Boot battle with Messi and Mbappé after back-to-back World Cup braces for Norway
Article Text:
Norway's Erling Haaland, left, celebrates with David Moeller Wolfe after scoring their third goal during the World Cup Group I soccer match between Norway and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J., near New York, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Steve Luciano)



Norway recover from Senegal pressure to secure qualification

Norway's Erling Haaland (9) scores their third goal during the World Cup Group I soccer match between Norway and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J., near New York, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Stephen Collingwood)

Haaland becomes Norway's greatest World Cup goalscorer

Norway's Erling Haaland (9) reacts during the World Cup Group I soccer match between Norway and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J., near New York, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo/Seth Wenig)

An achievement seen only six times in World Cup history

Guillermo Stábile (Argentina, 1930): Scored a hat-trick against Mexico on his debut, followed by a brace against Chile.

Sándor Kocsis (Hungary, 1954): Opened with a hat-trick against South Korea before scoring four goals against West Germany.

Just Fontaine (France, 1958): Began with a hat-trick against Paraguay and followed it with a brace against Yugoslavia.

Grzegorz Lato (Poland, 1974): Recorded consecutive braces against Argentina and Haiti.

Harry Kane (England, 2018): Scored a brace against Tunisia on debut and then a hat-trick against Panama.

A scoring record unlike anything seen in modern football

Erling Haaland (Norway): 59 goals in 52 appearances — 1.13 goals per game

Sándor Kocsis (Hungary): 75 goals in 68 matches — 1.10 goals per game

Gerd Müller (West Germany): 68 goals in 62 appearances — 1.10 goals per game

Harry Kane (England): Approximately 0.65 goals per game

Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal): Approximately 0.62 goals per game

Lionel Messi (Argentina): Approximately 0.59 goals per game

Golden Boot race intensifies ahead of France showdown

Norway striker scored twice in a 3-2 victory over Senegal to send his country into the knockout stages and continue one of the most prolific international goalscoring runs football has ever seen.Erling Haaland arrived at the 2026 FIFA World Cup carrying the weight of expectation that follows every elite striker, and within just two matches of his debut on football’s biggest stage, he has begun converting that expectation into a sequence of performances that are already reshaping Norway’s place in World Cup history.Haaland scored twice as Norway defeated Senegal 3-2 in an absorbing Group I contest at MetLife Stadium, a result that secured qualification for the Round of 32 and set up a decisive final group-stage meeting with France on June 27 to determine who finishes top of the group.For Norway, appearing at a World Cup for the first time since 1998, the victory marked a long-awaited return to relevance on the global stage, while for Haaland it represented another step in a remarkable international career that continues to gather momentum with each appearance.For much of the opening period, Senegal matched Norway’s intensity and threatened to disrupt their rhythm, forcing Ståle Solbakken’s side into a contest that required patience as much as attacking quality.The breakthrough eventually arrived in the 43rd minute when a costly misunderstanding between Kalidou Koulibaly and goalkeeper Édouard Mendy allowed Marcus Holmgren Pedersen to capitalise, giving Norway a lead just before the interval.That moment shifted the balance of the game, and Norway carried that advantage into the second half with renewed confidence. Only two minutes after the restart, Martin Ødegaard produced a pass that reflected both his vision and precision, threading an inch-perfect through ball into Haaland’s path, which the striker converted with composure to double the lead.Senegal responded quickly, with Sadio Mané driving forward and creating space for Ismaïla Sarr, who managed to finish while falling to the ground in the 53rd minute, reducing the deficit and briefly restoring tension to the contest.However, Haaland’s influence proved decisive once again. In the 58th minute, he met the ball first time inside the penalty area and struck a powerful volley that clipped the underside of the crossbar before crossing the line, restoring Norway’s two-goal advantage and placing them firmly in control.Sarr’s second goal deep into stoppage time ensured a tense conclusion, but Norway held on to secure a victory that confirmed their progression to the knockout rounds.Haaland entered the tournament without a single World Cup goal, yet within the span of two matches he has already accumulated four, a total that now makes him Norway’s highest goalscorer in FIFA World Cup history. In doing so, he surpassed the previous national record of two goals held by Kjetil Rekdal, a mark that had stood since Norway’s last appearance at the tournament in 1998, meaning Haaland has broken a record that remained untouched for 28 years.What makes this achievement particularly striking is not only the number itself but the speed with which it has been reached, as Haaland required just two appearances to establish himself as his country’s most prolific scorer in World Cup competition.His four goals have come through consecutive braces against Iraq and Senegal, placing him among a select group of players who have begun their World Cup journeys with extraordinary scoring consistency.By scoring twice against Senegal, Haaland became only the sixth player ever to score multiple goals in each of his first two World Cup appearances.The exclusive list spans almost a century of tournament history and includes some of football's greatest forwards.Before Haaland, only five players had achieved the feat, each doing so with remarkable scoring bursts across their opening two matches:Now Haaland has joined them, having scored consecutive braces against Iraq and Senegal.Even more impressively, he is only the second player in the last 50 years to achieve the milestone, following Kane's remarkable start for England in Russia eight years ago.For a player making his World Cup debut at 25 years old, it represents an extraordinary introduction to the tournament.While his World Cup performances have drawn significant attention, they form only part of a broader international record that continues to set new benchmarks.Haaland’s two goals against Senegal lifted his tally to 59 goals in just 52 appearances for Norway, giving him a goals-per-game ratio of 1.13, which stands as the highest recorded by any men’s international player with at least 50 caps over the past 100 years.To understand the scale of this achievement, it is necessary to consider the players who follow behind him:Haaland’s efficiency therefore places him not only ahead of his contemporaries but also beyond many of the most prolific scorers in football history.His latest goal also extended a remarkable run of consistency, as he has now scored in 12 consecutive competitive appearances for Norway and has found the net in 18 of his last 21 competitive international matches.Haaland’s brace has also ensured that he remains firmly in contention for the Golden Boot, with four goals from two matches placing him level with France captain Kylian Mbappé and just one behind Lionel Messi, who has reached five goals following Argentina’s latest fixture.Norway’s qualification guarantees that Haaland will have further opportunities to add to his tally, beginning with Friday’s meeting against France, a match that will determine the winner of Group I while also bringing together two of the tournament’s most prolific forwards.Mbappé arrives after scoring twice against Iraq, while Haaland enters the contest following another decisive performance against Senegal, setting the stage for a contest that carries both competitive and individual significance.For Norway, progression to the knockout rounds marks their first such achievement since 1998, but for Haaland, the focus continues to extend beyond qualification, as his four goals in two matches have already positioned him among the standout performers of the tournament, with the possibility that his influence will continue to grow as the competition advances.
Article Summary: Erling haaland scored twice as norway defeated senegal 3-2 in an absorbing group i contest at metlife stadium. The result secured qualification for the round of 32 and set up a decisive final group-stage meeting with france on june 27 to determine who finishes top of the group.

Article Title: 'Sometimes things happen that you never imagined': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi gets emotional after receiving India jersey - Watch
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. (Photo/screengrab)

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has hit bowlers around the park in the IPL. He has done it in Under-19 cricket, domestic matches and India A games as well. The 15-year-old is already being spoken about as a player who could become next big thing in cricket. But for all the runs and sixes, perhaps nothing compares to receiving an India jersey.Millions play cricket in India and many dream of representing the country. Only a handful get the chance to wear the blue jersey. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has now joined that group of lucky few after receiving his India kit ahead of the upcoming T20I series against Ireland.The teenager, who recently earned his first senior India call-up, spoke about the moment and said it fulfilled the dream that first drew him to the game.At 15 years and 71 days, Sooryavanshi has become the youngest player selected in India's senior men's squad, surpassing the record set by Sachin Tendulkar 36 years ago.Tendulkar made his India debut against Pakistan in 1989 at the age of 16 years and 205 days and remains the youngest Indian to play a senior international match. If Sooryavanshi takes the field during the upcoming tour, he will become the youngest player to debut for India in men's international cricket.Speaking in a video shared by the Board of Control for Cricket in India, Sooryavanshi said:"Words cannot explain it. The reason I picked up the bat from day one and went to the ground for practice: that dream is fulfilled now. The biggest step in that journey was completed today. I truly cannot put this feeling into words."I felt like a dream when I saw that T-shirt; I couldn't stop smiling. Sometimes things happen that you never imagined could happen. When it finally does, you don't know how to react. That was exactly how I felt."The BCCI shared the clip with the caption: "Ladies & Gentlemen, the moment the nation has been waiting for has arrived! Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in #TeamIndia jersey. Witness this incredibly special moment."India will play two T20Is in Belfast on June 26 and 28 before travelling to England for a five-match series from July 1 to 11. The men's cricket competition at the 2026 Asian Games begins on September 24, with the medal matches scheduled for October 3.Sooryavanshi's selection follows a strong IPL 2026 season with Rajasthan Royals . The left-hander finished as the tournament's highest run-scorer, winning the Orange Cap after scoring 776 runs in 16 innings at a strike rate of 237.30.His season included one century, five half-centuries and a tournament-record 72 sixes, performances that helped fast-track him into India's senior setup.
Article Summary: Vaibhav sooryavanshi is the youngest player in india's senior men's squad. The 15-year-old has been selected ahead of the upcoming t20i series against ireland. He will become the youngest indian to play a senior international match. Sachin tendulkar is the current record holder.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup: Erling Haaland, Norway join fans in 'viral' Viking Row, send stadium into a frenzy - Watch
Article Text:
Norway's players perform a rowing ritual during the World Cup Group I football match between Norway and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J., near New York, Monday, June 22, 2026. (AP Photo)

Norway booked their place in the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup 2026 after beating Senegal 3-2 in New Jersey on Monday. After the win, the players joined supporters in performing the traditional "Viking Row" celebration, led by captain Martin Ødegaard.The Viking Row has become a popular tradition among Norway fans during the tournament. Supporters sit in a formation resembling a Viking longboat and mimic rowing movements to the beat of a drum, drawing comparisons with Iceland's famous "Viking Clap" from Euro 2016.Norway supporters have performed the chant during both of their World Cup matches and across host cities Boston and New York City. Following Monday's victory, players and coaching staff joined in the celebration with fans.Match-winner Erling Haaland said he was eager to take part in the ritual if Norway secured the win."I saw it online; it's gone completely viral," Haaland told Fox Sports. "Martin [Ødegaard] asked me before the game: 'Do you think we should join in?' I said, 'if we win, let's do it, why not?'"After the final whistle, Haaland, his teammates and coach Ståle Solbakken went over to the Norway supporters, sat down in formation and joined the Viking Row celebration.Haaland scored twice in the match, taking his tally in the tournament to four goals. He remains in contention for the Golden Boot alongside players such as Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappé and Harry Kane.Captain Ødegaard set the rhythm during the celebration by beating a drum while players and supporters joined together in the post-match scenes.The Viking Row symbolises unity, strength and teamwork. Inspired by the image of Vikings rowing together before battle, supporters perform the gesture in unison to show support for the national team.On the field, Norway took the lead in the 43rd minute through Marcus Holmgren Pedersen. Haaland then added goals in the 48th and 58th minutes to put Norway in command and help secure qualification for the knockout rounds.The result guarantees Norway at least second place in Group I. Their final group-stage match against France national football team in Foxborough, Massachusetts, on Friday will decide who finishes top of the group.
Article Summary: Norway booked their place in the knockout stage of the fifa world cup 2026 after beating senegal 3-2 in new jersey on monday. After the win, the players joined supporters in performing the traditional "viking row" celebration. The viking row has become a popular tradition among norway fans during the tournament.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Carolina Panthers and Los Angeles Chargers linked to $21M Philadelphia Eagles star amid blockbuster market reset
Article Text:
NFL trade rumors: Carolina Panthers and Los Angeles Chargers linked to’ $21M Eagles star amid blockbuster market reset(Getty)

Category



Details



Player



Jalen Carter



Current Team





Philadelphia Eagles



Rumored Teams



Carolina Panthers and Los Angeles Chargers



Current Cap Hit



$6.93 million (2026)



Trade Likelihood



Moderate



Latest Insider Update



Anthony Palacios suggested the Eagles may be forced into difficult contract decisions after Jeffery Simmons deal



Contract Status



Under contract through 2027



Potential Return



First-round pick plus defensive assets





Which teams are interested in Jalen Carter?

What insiders are saying about the Eagles trade rumors ?

Contract details and salary cap implications



How could the trade impact both teams?

The Philadelphia Eagles are suddenly facing fresh pressure after Jeffery Simmons reset the defensive tackle market with a massive $105 million extension. That new deal has only fueled more talk about Jalen Carter and whether Philadelphia can afford to keep its young defensive star long term.While there is no official indication that the Philadelphia Eagles are actively shopping Jalen Carter, league chatter has begun to build around the idea that, if contract talks stall, a blockbuster move could become a real possibility. Two teams already being linked as possible landing spots are the Carolina Panthers and the Los Angeles Chargers.The Carolina Panthers have quickly become one of the more logical fits. The Panthers have spent heavily rebuilding their front seven, but there are still concerns at defensive tackle after Tershawn Wharton dealt with injuries. Adding Carter would instantly give them one of the most disruptive young linemen in football.For the Carolina Panthers, this would not just be about filling a need. It would be about building a true championship-level defensive front around Bryce Young while the offense continues developing.The Los Angeles Chargers are another team that is strongly connected. The Chargers have cap flexibility, and their defensive line still lacks a dominant centerpiece despite bringing back Khalil Mack and adding veteran depth.Carter would immediately become the long-term anchor of that unit and help transform a defense that has lacked interior dominance for several seasons.According to Anthony Palacios of Last Word on Sports, the Simmons contract may have dramatically changed the conversation for the Philadelphia Eagles. Palacios suggested the Eagles may now be facing a difficult choice: pay Carter at a market-setting number or seriously consider trade scenarios before his leverage grows even stronger.He also noted that Philadelphia has already extended Jordan Davis, which could complicate how much money they are willing to invest across the defensive interior. The biggest concern is simple. If Carter plays another elite season, his price could climb even higher than Simmons’.That creates huge pressure for Philly.Jalen Carter is currently playing under the four-year, $21.8 million fully guaranteed rookie contract he signed with the Philadelphia Eagles after being selected in the first round of the 2023 NFL Draft. The deal included a $12.8 million signing bonus and keeps him under team control through the 2027 season. For 2026, Carter carries a cap hit of $6.93 million, while his cash payout sits at $3.72 million, making him one of the most affordable high-impact defensive tackles in the league right now.That value is exactly why his situation has become more complicated. With Jeffery Simmons resetting the defensive tackle market with a $105 million extension, Philadelphia now faces the reality that Carter’s next contract could easily push beyond $30 million annually if his production continues to rise. For teams like the Carolina Panthers or Los Angeles Chargers, trading for Jalen Carter would mean inheriting one of the league’s best bargain contracts now, while gaining exclusive control before negotiating what could become a franchise-defining extension.For the Philadelphia Eagles, trading Jalen Carter would be risky. He is the centerpiece of their defensive future and one of the few interior defenders in football capable of changing games on his own. Losing him would create a massive hole in the middle of the line, but it could also bring major draft capital and offer flexibility to build around younger, cheaper pieces like Moro Ojomo.For the Carolina Panthers, adding Carter could completely change the ceiling of the defence and push them into serious NFC contention. For the Los Angeles Chargers, it would be an aggressive move that could reshape the AFC playoff race.Right now, nothing is imminent. But after the Simmons extension, the Eagles know one thing clearly: waiting will only make this decision harder.
Article Summary: Nfl trade rumors: carolina panthers and los angeles chargers linked to’ $21m eagles star amid blockbuster market reset. The philadelphia eagles are suddenly facing fresh pressure after jeffery simmons reset the defensive tackle market with a massive $105 million extension.

Article Title: Antonela Roccuzzo’s sweet gesture on Georgina Rodriguez’s IG post steals spotlight amid Lionel Messi-Cristiano Ronaldo FIFA World Cup 2026 rivalry
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo and Georgina Rodríguez vs Lionel Messi and Antonela Roccuzzo combined net worth in 2025: Who leads in money, global football fame, old rivalry and 2026 worldcup

Antonela Roccuzzo’s heartwarming gesture draws attention online



The long-standing football rivalry between Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo has often led to comparisons. Even between their families. However, a recent social media interaction showed the respect and friendship that exists away from the football field. Cristiano Ronaldo’s fiancée, Georgina Rodriguez, recently shared a heartwarming video of their daughter Alana Martina singing on Instagram . The clip quickly attracted 873K likes and 16K+ comments from fans around the world. Users were impressed by the young girl’s talent and confidence.Among the many reactions, one comment stood out the most. Lionel Messi's wife Antonela Roccuzzo, also showed her appreciation for the video by liking the post. She also left a red heart emoji in the comments section. Her simple but adorable gesture received praise from fans. Many lauded the positive interaction between two of the most famous football families. This is a proof that mutual respect can exist despite the constant comparisons between Messi and Ronaldo.Georgina Rodríguez recently delighted her followers by posting a video featuring her daughter Alana Martina.Born in November 2017, Alana is known for her cheerful personality and frequent appearances on her mother’s social media accounts. In the latest video, the youngster displayed her love for music.She impressed viewers with her singing abilities. The clip gained attention online. Fans flooded the comments section with compliments and encouraging messages. Many praised Alana’s confidence and natural talent. Several followers also noted how mature and expressive her voice sounded for a child of her age.While many comments celebrated the young star, Antonela Roccuzzo’s reaction became one of the most talked-about moments from the post. Lionel Messi’s wife showed her support by liking the video and posting a red heart emoji. Her gesture was small, but it was meaningful. Fans viewed it as a sign of warmth and admiration for the youngster's talent.Many praised Antonela for her kindness and positivity. Others pointed out that despite years of comparisons between Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo, their families have repeatedly shown respect toward each other. The exchange between Georgina and Antonela once again reflected that spirit.Antonela and Georgina are among the most influential women in football. Both have built successful careers as influencers. They also work as entrepreneurs while supporting their famous partners.Talking about the ongoing FIFA World Cup 2026, Messi is gearing up to represent Argentina against Austria today. Meanwhile, Ronaldo is gearing up for Portugal’s upcoming match against Uzbekistan.
Article Summary: Georgina rodríguez shared a video of her daughter alana martina singing. The clip attracted 873k likes and 16k+ comments from fans around the world. Lionel messi's wife antonela roccuzzo, also showed her appreciation for the video by liking the post.

Article Title: “I won’t hide it”: Luka Doncic drops truth bomb on Lakers heartbreaking playoff run as he aims for a stronger return
Article Text:
Luka Doncic. Image via: Mark J. Rebilas-Imagn Image

Why Luka Doncic calls the Lakers' 2025-26 season a failure and what changes next

Luka Doncic of the Lakers (Image via Getty)

How the Lakers plan to build around Doncic's "A-list center" request this offseason

Luka Doncic (Image via: Jesse Johnson-Imagn Images)

Luka Doncic says a season without a championship is a failed one, and he is not softening that stance after watching the Los Angeles Lakers get swept by the Oklahoma City Thunder in the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs. Doncic missed that entire playoff run with a hamstring injury suffered on April 2, forcing LeBron James and a banged-up Austin Reaves to carry the load without him. Now healthy again, Doncic is making his expectations for next season clear to anyone who will listen."I won't hide it, if you don't win the title, it's a bad season," Doncic said. "We've been unlucky with injuries, myself included, after we played some great basketball in March. It's going to be a long time before next season. I hope it's better for us."The Lakers were rolling before the injury hit. Los Angeles strung together a nine-game winning streak in March, with Doncic playing some of the best basketball of his career alongside Reaves and James. Then the hamstring strain sidelined him for good, and the Lakers had to lean on a 41-year-old James to get past Houston in the first round before running into a deeper, healthier Thunder team that swept them in four.Doncic finished the regular season averaging 33.5 points, 7.7 rebounds and 8.3 assists per game, leading the league in scoring. None of that matters to him without a title. At 27 and squarely in his prime, he's treating every non-championship year the same way he did at Real Madrid, where falling short of a trophy is considered a disappointment regardless of the regular-season numbers.That mindset is already shaping the Lakers' offseason approach. According to ESPN's Dave McMenamin, Doncic has told general manager Rob Pelinka and head coach JJ Redick that his top priority is adding what sources called an "A-list center," someone who can protect the rim, control the boards and finish lobs alongside his pick-and-roll game. Detroit's Jalen Duren and Utah's Walker Kessler have come up as names who would satisfy that request, though both are restricted free agents whose current teams are expected to fight to keep them.The Lakers also face decisions on Reaves' player option, Deandre Ayton's situation at center and James' own free agency, all of which will determine how much financial flexibility Pelinka has to chase a difference-maker up front. Doncic has reportedly spent the early part of the offseason training at full speed and even working in golf outings with James and Reaves, a sign he's moved past the injury both physically and mentally.What remains unresolved is whether the front office can actually deliver the center Doncic is asking for, and whether James returns at all. Either way, the Lakers know the clock on this era is already running. It would be exciting to see the Purple and Gold's upcoming roster change.
Article Summary: Luka doncic says a season without a championship is a failed one. The los angeles lakers were swept by the oklahoma city thunder in the 2026 nba playoffs. Doncic missed that entire playoff run with a hamstring injury suffered on april 2. Now healthy again, he is making his expectations for next season clear.

Article Title: "In a mega relationship": Super Bowl winner caught in Dianna Russini-Mike Vrabel debate after NFL podcaster's viral post
Article Text:
Former Super Bowl champion Jason McCourty was pulled into the ongoing Dianna Russini-Mike Vrabel controversy after NFL podcaster Tony Farmer criticized him for not addressing the situation on social media. The exchange gained traction when Farmer claimed his reply had "ratioed" McCourty's original post about Jeffrey Simmons' contract extension. Fans were divided, with some backing Farmer's questions while others urged him to move on from the controversy.

Jason McCourty drawn into Dianna Russini-Mike Vrabel discussion after congratulatory post

NFL fans remain divided over the Russini-Vrabel controversy

Again, social media has made a routine NFL post into a much larger discussion. This time it was former New England Patriots cornerback Jason McCourty in the middle of a brewing online debate that’s tied to the ongoing conversation about Dianna Russini and Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel. What started as a congratulatory text quickly escalated into a heated exchange that garnered thousands of reactions.It was a reminder of how fast NFL narratives can change during the offseason. Even without fresh developments from the people directly involved, fan speculation and online commentary continue to keep the topic alive, pulling former players and media personalities into discussions they did not initiate.Jason McCourty's original post had nothing to do with controversy. The former Super Bowl-winning defensive back congratulated Tennessee Titans star Jeffrey Simmons after the defensive tackle secured a major contract extension."Much deserved! Big Jeff is a monster!"However, NFL podcaster Tony Farmer responded by questioning why McCourty had not publicly commented on the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel story."Jason are you going to talk about the Russini Vrabel story or just ignore it because the company you work for employed her for 7 years and directly benefited from her relationship to mike vrabel,"The exchange gained attention after Farmer pointed out that his reply received more engagement than McCourty's original message. He later followed it with another post that read:"Former NFL player Jason McCourty who now works for ESPN gets (ratioed) in brutal fashion,"Although the number of likes on social media does not necessarily reflect broader public opinion, the interaction showed that many NFL fans remain interested in the controversy, even as training camp approaches and official updates remain scarce.The discussion did not stop with the two posts. Fans quickly filled the replies with sharply different opinions, reflecting how polarizing the topic has become across NFL circles.Some users criticized Farmer for continuing to focus on the story."I’m dead serious you need some help man get over this life’s bigger,""I think you have issues that might need to be addressed on a professional level,""Another 🤡 post of the week. You are on a roll!!!" Others believed the questions surrounding the situation deserve further attention." story never dies until addressed by the NFL (Goodell) so it may never die certainly more to story that NFL doesn’t want you to know much more than simple ‘cheating on spouse’ and kids’""Great question!" One fan even speculated about the silence from major media personalities, writing:"ESPN now in a mega relationship w NFL they are in CAHOOTS’ it’s so cahooty I’m thinkin if you approach the topic you’re out … nothing from Van Pelt Steven A wilbon/korndog Buck/Aikman Brandt/Pellesaro/Dales/Arrington/Rappaport all silenced,"For now, neither Mike Vrabel nor Dianna Russini has publicly added anything new to the conversation. With the Patriots expected to remain out of the spotlight until training camp begins in late July, online debates may continue to fuel interest until there is an official statement or another significant development.
Article Summary: Jason mccourty's original post had nothing to do with controversy. Nfl podcaster tony farmer criticized him for not addressing the situation on social media. Fans were divided, with some backing farmer's questions while others urged him to move on from the controversy.

Article Title: Morocco script football history, surpass Italy and Argentina with record 39-game unbeaten streak
Article Text:
Morocco football team. (AP Photo)

A run built on discipline, structure and belief



More than numbers: a footballing transformation



All-time longest unbeaten streaks:

1. Morocco — 39 games (2023-Present)

2. Italy — 37 games (2018-2021)

3. Argentina — 36 games (2019-2022)

4. Algeria — 35 games

4. Spain — 35 games

4. Brazil — 35 games

5. Spain — 32 games (2024-Present)

Surpassing giants of the game



Morocco have etched their name into football folklore after extending their unbeaten run to a staggering 39 matches, setting a new all-time benchmark in international football and overtaking legendary streaks held by Italy and Argentina.The Atlas Lions now stand alone at the top of the global game, surpassing Italy’s celebrated 37-match unbeaten run under Roberto Mancini and Argentina’s 36-game streak that preceded their World Cup triumph in Qatar.What began as a remarkable rise has now become a record-breaking era, with Morocco transforming consistency into history on the international stage.At the heart of Morocco’s extraordinary achievement lies a defensive system that has redefined resilience in modern football. From the 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar through to the ongoing 2026 campaign across the United States, Canada and Mexico, the Atlas Lions have built their success on tactical discipline, compact organisation and collective sacrifice.Led by key figures such as Achraf Hakimi, Nayef Aguerd and goalkeeper Yassine Bounou, Morocco’s backline has become one of the most reliable units in world football.Under Walid Regragui, Morocco’s identity has become unmistakable: a side capable of suffering without losing structure, and striking with precision on the counterattack.The foundation was laid in Qatar 2022, where Morocco became the first African and Arab nation to reach a World Cup semi-final, defeating powerhouses including Belgium, Spain and Portugal along the way.Rather than fading after that breakthrough, the Atlas Lions have only grown stronger, blending experienced leaders with emerging talent and maintaining tactical continuity under new coach Mohamed Ouahbi.In a recent 1-0 win over Scotland in Boston in FIFA World Cup 2026, Morocco also completed 601 passes from 671 attempts, recording 59% possession and asserting near-total control — further evidence of their growing dominance in both structure and style.To surpass Italy and Argentina underscores the magnitude of Morocco’s achievement. Italy’s 37-game streak was once considered a modern benchmark of defensive perfection, while Argentina’s 36-match run formed the backbone of their World Cup-winning momentum.Now, Morocco sit above both, rewriting what is possible for teams outside traditional football superpowers.Their unbeaten streak has also eclipsed other elite nations, including Algeria, Spain and Brazil, all of whom have recorded long runs but now trail the new leaders.As the 2026 World Cup continues, Morocco now stand not just as record holders, but as genuine contenders for major international silverware.
Article Summary: Morocco have extended their unbeaten run to a staggering 39 matches. The atlas lions now stand alone at the top of the global game. Italy’s celebrated 37-match unbeaten run under roberto mancini and argentina's 36-game streak that preceded their world cup triumph in qatar.

Article Title: 'Not sure people know about it': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi makes cheeky admission after 29-ball 94 in Tri-Nation final
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (Screengrabs)

Tilak Varma praises team's response

Poll What stood out most about Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s record-breaking performance? His fearless batting style His ability to perform under pressure

NEW DELHI: Fresh off a record-breaking knock in the Tri-Nation Series final, teenage batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi made a cheeky admission about his credentials in 50-over cricket, saying many people may not even realise how much experience he has in the format.The 15-year-old starred in India A's title-clinching victory over Sri Lanka A on Sunday, smashing a stunning 94 off just 29 balls. In the process, he registered the fastest List A fifty in history, reaching the milestone in only 11 deliveries. His explosive start helped India A post 377/9 before dismissing Sri Lanka A for 311 to seal a comfortable 66-run victory.Despite heading into the final after a modest run with the bat and an on-field altercation against the same opposition in the previous game, Sooryavanshi said he never felt under pressure.“I hadn't thought of anything. Just wanted to execute what I planned in the first ten and take it forward from there,” Sooryavanshi said after being named player of the match.Questions had been raised over the youngster's form and temperament after he managed only 117 runs in four innings during the tournament. But Sooryavanshi revealed that discussions with the coaching staff helped him rediscover his rhythm.Watch:“No pressure. I wasn't executing what I wanted. But after consulting with the coaches, I got it right.Learnt a lot this series,” he said.Known mainly for his six-hitting exploits in T20 cricket, the left-hander insisted he was equally comfortable in the longer white-ball format.“I've played a lot of 50-over cricket. Not sure people know about it,” he said.“The challenge was to adapt to different conditions, it was nice to take it on.”India A captain Tilak Varma lauded the team's resilience after bouncing back from consecutive defeats earlier in the competition.“Everyone showed real character. Especially after we lost back-to-back games. Then we won with big margins which was tremendous,” Tilak said.“Everyone has played domestic cricket and has experience. Just a matter of planning before the game. We start big, consolidate and accelerate,” he added.Sri Lanka A skipper Sahan Arachchige acknowledged the impact of Sooryavanshi's innings.“Sooryavanshi played a brilliant innings. We managed the innings nicely thereon but let it slide in the last two overs,” Arachchige said.“When we are chasing a big score, top order can fall cheaply. It happens. Young guys have played well, seniors have scored too. It's been a good tournament,” he added.
Article Summary: Vaibhav sooryavanshi made cheeky admission about his experience in 50-over cricket. The 15-year-old hit 94 off just 29 balls in india a's title-clinching victory over sri lanka a. He registered the fastest list a fifty in history, reaching the milestone in only 11 deliveries.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) beat chennai super kings (csk) by 43 runs. Tim david, rajat patidar and devdutt padikkal all scored half-centuries. Rcb set a new record for highest total in ipl 2026 with 250/3.

Article Title: Powerball winning numbers announced for Monday, June 22, 2026: Who won the $312 million jackpot and how can you check your ticket
Article Text:
Powerball winning numbers for June 22, 2026



17, 19, 21, 45, 48



Powerball: 13



Power Play: 2x

Understanding how Powerball works



How to play Powerball



Powerball winning numbers for June 22 2026 related FAQs



How much was the jackpot?

When are Powerball drawings held?

What does Power Play do?

What happens if nobody wins the jackpot?

The latest Powerball draw has captured the attention of lottery players across the United States, with an estimated jackpot of $312 million on offer and a cash value of $141.2 million. Officials have now released the winning numbers from the draw conducted on June 22, 2026, ending days of anticipation among hopeful ticket holders seeking a life-changing prize.As one of America's most widely played lottery games, Powerball regularly generates excitement whenever jackpots climb into the hundreds of millions. The substantial prize prompted millions of entries ahead of the drawing, with participants eager for a chance to claim the top reward.The release of the winning combination now shifts focus to ticket verification and prize claims. Lottery officials will determine whether any player successfully matched all required numbers to secure the jackpot. Check below the latest results for June 22, 2026, Monday, and how to claim your reward.The winning numbers from the latest Powerball draw were:Powerball is a multi-state lottery game that offers players the chance to win prizes ranging from a few dollars to jackpots worth hundreds of millions.Managed by the Multi-State Lottery Association (MUSL), the game is available in numerous states and remains one of the most recognised lottery draws in the country.Players select five numbers from 1 to 69, known as the white balls, and then choose a separate Powerball number from 1 to 26. During the official drawing, randomly selected numbers determine the winning combination. Each draw is independent, meaning previous results have no impact on future outcomes.Drawings take place three times a week: every Monday, Wednesday and Saturday at 10:59 pm Eastern Time giving participants multiple opportunities to compete for major prizes.To enter the game, players first choose five numbers from the main pool of 1 to 69. They then select a Powerball number between 1 and 26.Those who prefer not to choose their own numbers can use the Quick Pick option, which generates a random set of selections automatically.After purchasing a ticket before sales close, players are entered into the next scheduled drawing. Once the results are announced, the numbers on the ticket can be checked against the official winning combination to determine whether a prize has been won.For an additional $1 per play, participants can add the Power Play feature. This option can multiply eligible non-jackpot winnings by a randomly drawn multiplier, increasing the value of certain prizes.The estimated jackpot for the draw was $312 million, with a cash option worth $141.2 million.Powerball drawings take place every Monday, Wednesday and Saturday at 10:59 pm Eastern Time.Power Play is an optional feature that costs an extra $1 and can increase eligible non-jackpot prizes through a randomly selected multiplier.If no ticket matches all five white balls and the Powerball, the jackpot rolls over to the next drawing, causing the prize amount to increase for future participants.
Article Summary: The latest powerball draw took place on june 22, 2026. The estimated jackpot for the draw was $312 million, with a cash value of $141.2 million. Officials have now released the winning numbers from the draw. The release of the winning combination now shifts focus to ticket verification.

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Satwiksairaj Rankireddy - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Disclaimer: Content Produced by PNB Metlife

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
Article Summary: The 7th pnb metlife junior badminton championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide. The grand finale unfolded at the indira gandhi indoor stadium in new delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton.

Article Title: Riot Games announces new Summit map for Valorant: Here’s what’s new
Article Text:
“Dropping walls cuts off key sightlines and rotations paths for the rest of the round,”

Valorant new Summit map: Features, ranked changes and other details



Riot Games has announced a new map called Summit for Valorant. This new map is set to launch on June 24 as part of Season 2026 Act 4. The map introduces new environmental mechanics that allow players to alter sightlines and rotation paths during a match. Set in a Radiant training academy located in the mountains of China, Summit features training halls and meditation gardens connected through interactive structures. According to Riot Games, the map was once home to the Radiant monastery where Sage trained before joining the Valorant Protocol.Summit follows a traditional two-site, three-lane layout but adds a new gameplay element in the form of droppable walls located at A Site, B Site and Mid. Once activated, these walls permanently change parts of the map for the remainder of the round.the game’s developers said. The map will be available in Competitive mode immediately after launch.To encourage players to learn the new map, Riot Games is introducing temporary Ranked Rating (RR) adjustments during Summit's first two weeks.Players who lose matches on Summit will lose 50% less RR than usual, while victories will continue to award 100% RR. Riot is also launching a dedicated Summit Only queue for the first seven days after release. Matches in this playlist will use the Swiftplay format, allowing players to become familiar with the map before encountering it regularly in competitive play.Alongside Summit, Riot Games is introducing Retake, a new 3v3 game mode focused entirely on post-plant scenarios. In Retake, the Spike is already planted at the start of each round. One team must defend the site while the other attempts to retake and defuse. Teams switch sides every round, and players receive randomized loadouts that become stronger as matches progress.The mode is designed to focus on one of Valorant's most common high-pressure situations while offering shorter, round-based gameplay. Season 2026 Act 4 will also introduce the Blackspyre Collection, a new weapon skin line inspired by science fiction and mystical themes.The collection includes skins for the Phantom, Sheriff, Spectre and Ares, along with a new melee weapon called the Divide. The Act 4 Battlepass will feature several cosmetic items, including the Sky Reaper Ghost, Heal Up Squad Card and Blep Spray.
Article Summary: Riot games has announced a new map called summit for valorant. This new map is set to launch on june 24 as part of season 2026 act 4. The map introduces new environmental mechanics that allow players to alter sightlines and rotation paths during a match.

Article Title: Nitish Kumar Reddy ruled out of T20Is against Ireland; unlikely for England series too
Article Text:
Nitish Kumar Reddy

India’s updated squad for Ireland T20Is:

Poll Who should get the bigger opportunity after the injury setback in India's squad? A young player should step up An experienced player should take charge

Schedule of Ireland’s T20I series against India:

NEW DELHI: India all-rounder Nitish Kumar Reddy has been ruled out of the two-match T20I series against Ireland starting June 26 in Belfast. It is learnt that Reddy's quadriceps injury, which kept him out of the 2nd ODI against Afghanistan in Lucknow, has flared up and requires attention before he can take the field again. The exact timeline for his return is unknown at this stage.Reddy was also picked for the ODIs and T20Is against England; it remains to be seen whether the injury rules him out of that series too. As things stand, he will not travel with the team to Ireland.The Indian team will leave in batches for the Ireland series. One batch, featuring Sanju Samson, Axar Patel, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Abhishek Sharma, Morne Morkel and T Dilip, left today from Chennai while some players are scheduled to leave tomorrow from Mumbai.If the selectors name a replacement for Reddy, Suryansh Shedge is the front-runner due to his impressive recent outings for India A in Sri Lanka.Reddy was also picked for the ODIs and T20Is against England; it is highly unlikely that he will feature in that series. For now, he will not travel with the team to Ireland.The 23-year-old has played 10 Tests, 6 ODIs and 4 T20Is for India so far. During the Afghanistan series, he had played two ODIs while missing the second game in Lucknow.Shreyas Iyer (Captain), Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson (WK), Ishan Kishan (WK), Shivam Dube, Tilak Varma (Vice-Captain), Axar Patel, Washington Sundar, Ravi Bishnoi, Harshit Rana, Arshdeep Singh, Prince Yadav, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Prasidh Krishna.First T20I: June 26, 2026, Belfast, 1:30pmSecond T20I: June 28, 2026, Belfast, 1:30pm*All timings in local time
Article Summary: India all-rounder nitish kumar reddy has been ruled out of the two-match t20i series against ireland starting june 26 in belfast. Reddy's quadriceps injury has flared up and requires attention before he can take the field again. The exact timeline for his return is unknown at this stage.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup: Will Ronaldo be benched against Uzbekistan? Portugal coach keeps starting XI under wraps
Article Text:
Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo reacts during the World Cup Group K match against Congo. (AP Photo)

Martínez defends squad amid “noise and tension”



Ronaldo’s role under scrutiny ahead of key clash



Portugal coach Roberto Martínez has refused to confirm whether Cristiano Ronaldo will retain his starting place for Tuesday’s FIFA World Cup clash against Uzbekistan, following the superstar’s subdued performance in the team’s opening match.“I can’t inform you about the starting 11 because I haven’t informed my players,” Martínez said Monday when asked if Ronaldo would remain in the lineup.The 41-year-old forward failed to find the net in Portugal’s 1-1 draw with Congo, a match in which he had limited influence and missed several key chances during the second half. His performance quickly became a talking point, with television pundits and social media users questioning both his finishing and why he was not substituted as Portugal searched for a breakthrough.Martínez, however, dismissed suggestions that external criticism is affecting the squad, insisting that such pressure is part of the World Cup environment.“We are playing a World Cup so of course we have a lot of noise and tension, but it’s part of the game,” he said. “The focus is on the team and we want to show a positive attitude … to be ready for the match. We are very much focused. We are strong. The team is even more united than before.”While not directly addressing Ronaldo, the Portugal coach also pushed back against the intensity of criticism aimed at individuals.“Some of the criticism is ‘unfair, it’s unjust,’” he added.Ronaldo, who did not speak to reporters after the match, later posted on social media: “It wasn’t the start we wanted, but this is far from over. Head up and focus on the next game.” He followed it up with images from training accompanied by the caption: “Focused on the mission.”Despite registering just 25 touches in the opener, Ronaldo remains central to Portugal’s tactical discussion. Martínez insisted the veteran forward still brings decisive value in the final third.“Cristiano is the best one to do that,” he said. “The numbers support this of this iconic player who is Cristiano Ronaldo. If you look at the past 32 games, he is the player that has extra movement, opening spaces and finding pockets.”Uzbekistan coach Fabio Cannavaro, meanwhile, warned against underestimating the Portuguese captain despite his quiet start.“We need to be careful when we are in the box because we cannot leave this kind of player alone,” Cannavaro said. “We need to be very focused on him because Cristiano can score in every situation, free kicks, even in the corner. So we need to be very careful.”
Article Summary: Portugal coach roberto martínez refuses to confirm whether cristiano ronaldo will retain his starting place for tuesday’s fifa world cup clash against uzbekistan. Ronaldo failed to find the net in portugal's 1-1 draw with congo, a match in which he had limited influence and missed several key chances.

Article Title: Algeria vs Jordan, FIFA World Cup Match Result: Algeria strike twice from corners to stun Jordan 2-1 and keep knockout dreams alive
Article Text:
Algeria's Amine Gouiri, front, celebrates after scoring his side's second goal against Jordan. (AP Photo)

Jordan strike first but Algeria respond late



Gouiri completes turnaround as knockout hopes remain alive



Algeria kept their FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout hopes firmly alive with a spirited 2-1 comeback victory over Jordan in a crucial Group J clash on Monday night, overturning an early deficit with two second-half set-piece goals.The win, secured at the San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, marked Algeria’s first World Cup victory since 2014 and also ended Jordan’s debut campaign after two straight defeats.Both sides entered the contest under pressure after opening-match losses, but it was Jordan who struck first against the run of play. In the 36th minute, Mousa Al Tamari’s effort fell kindly inside the box, allowing Nizar Al Rashdan to finish confidently with the outside of his right boot and register Jordan’s first-ever World Cup goal lead.Algeria, however, grew into the game after the break and began to dominate possession and territory. Their persistence finally paid off in the 69th minute when substitute Nadhir Benbouali rose highest to meet Riyad Mahrez’s corner, powering a header into the net to level the score.The equaliser shifted momentum firmly in Algeria’s favour as wave after wave of attacks followed, with Jordan struggling to contain the pressure.Algeria completed their comeback in the 82nd minute, once again capitalising on a set-piece situation. Amine Gouiri reacted quickest inside the box as the ball dropped following another corner, guiding it home from close range after a deflection to seal a crucial 2-1 lead.The goal sparked celebrations among Algeria’s supporters behind the goal, with the North African side holding firm in the closing stages to secure a vital three points.The victory carries historic significance, marking Algeria’s first World Cup win after conceding the opening goal in a match, having previously failed to win any of their nine such encounters (seven defeats and two draws).The result also keeps Algeria in contention for a Round of 32 place. After an opening 3-0 defeat to Argentina, they now sit on three points in Group J and can still finish second with a win over Austria in their final group game.For Jordan, the defeat confirmed elimination from their maiden World Cup appearance, despite a spirited effort across both matches.Argentina lead the group with six points from two wins, while Austria sit second on three points with a superior goal difference over Algeria, setting up a tense final round of fixtures in Group J.
Article Summary: Nizar al rashdan opened the scoring for jordan in the 36th minute. Nadhir benbouali levelled the score in the 69th minute with a header. Amine gouiri completed algeria's comeback in the 82nd minute. The win keeps algeria in contention for a round of 32 place.
